HomePage.join_title: Join the all-in-one crypto app in Vietnam
HomePage.trade_like_description: Get the lowest fees, fastest transactions, powerful APIs, and more
HomePage.trade_way_title: With you every step of the way
HomePage.trade_way_description: From making your first crypto trade to becoming a seasoned trader, you’ll have us to guide you through the process. No question is too small. No sleepless nights. Have confidence in your crypto.
HomePage.what_is_description: Find out why we're your new favorite crypto app with some help from our world-class partners
HomePage.accordion_1_description: DoiUSDT is an innovative cryptocurrency exchange with advanced financial offerings. We offer cutting-edge crypto trading and earning services to millions of users globally in more than 180 regions. With DOIUSDT, you can: Trade a wide variety of tokens and trading pairs. Connect to the world-famous TradingView Platform and trade crypto directly with their supercharged charts.
HomePage.accordion_2_title: How do I buy Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies on DOIUSDT?
HomePage.accordion_2_description: Easily buy Bitcoin within minutes with GBP, EUR, USD, or your local currency. DoiUSDT supports various popular payment methods, including Visa, Mastercard, and ApplePay credit cards. To get started, check out our latest guide on how to buy Bitcoin on DOIUSDT. Want to buy, sell, or hold other coins that are gaining traction in the crypto ecosystem? Kickstart your journey with DoiUSDT and explore prices and other information for cryptos such as Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH) and more!
HomePage.accordion_3_description: Cryptocurrency is a decentralized digital currency that operates on blockchain technology. Its key features include transparency, borderless transactions and immutability. Some of the most popular cryptocurrencies, by market capitalization, include Bitcoin, Ethereum, Tether, which can be traded on DOIUSDT.
HomePage.mobile_welcome_reward_description: Send money to increase daily and monthly benefits. Withdraw money quickly 24/7.

StakingPage.title: Staking
StakingPage.wellcome: Welcome to the VND to USDT Conversion Service – where all your transactions are absolutely secure and completely safe.
StakingPage.staking_Consignment1: Deposit 1 day: Deposit from 500 Pi to 999 Pi, interest 0.8%.
StakingPage.staking_Consignment2: Deposit 3 days: Deposit from 1000 Pi to 4,999 Pi, interest 3%.
StakingPage.staking_Consignment3: Deposit 7 days: Deposit from 5000 Pi to 9,999 Pi, interest 6%.
StakingPage.staking_Consignment4: Deposit 15 days: Deposit from 10,000 Pi to 999,999 Pi, interest 15%.
StakingPage.decription: Earn passive income with your crypto
StakingPage.note: Turn your idle crypto into a steady source of income with just a few simple steps. DoiUSDT allows you to lock tokens to support the operation of the blockchain network and receive periodic rewards.

DepositWithdrawPage.title2: If you encounter an error message from ADMIN when transferring VND, please contact Customer Support immediately for assistance.
DepositWithdrawPage.title3: Go to the deposit section, and once your payment is complete, take a screenshot of the successful transaction and submit it for the fastest approval.
DepositWithdrawPage.title5: You can withdraw in two currencies: VND and USDT.
DepositWithdrawPage.title6: When withdrawing VND, please double-check your receiving account before confirming the withdrawal.
DepositWithdrawPage.title7: If you wish to withdraw USDT, you first need to convert VND to USDT in the conversion section.
DepositWithdrawPage.title8: For USDT withdrawals, add your wallet address before making a transaction. You will have 3 wallet sources to verify: Binance, Standard Wallet, and Trust Wallet.
DepositWithdrawPage.title9: To change your receiving wallet address, go to Security > Add Bank Account > Update Receiving Wallet Address.
DepositWithdrawPage.note: Note: After completing the payment, please take a screenshot and confirm that the payment has been made.
